assertionResults.title: hides upload prompt when questions already exist (even with no ready files)

assertionResults.title: shows "Generate General Questions" when no questions exist

assertionResults.fullName: GeneralQuestionsTab shows "Regenerate General Questions" when questions already exist
assertionResults.title: shows "Regenerate General Questions" when questions already exist
